# CWE-412 positive: client-chosen lock file path (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-412-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"sync"
)

var jobGate sync.Mutex

func HandleAcquireLock(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	lockPath := r.URL.Query().Get("lockfile")
	data, err := os.ReadFile(lockPath)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "lock read failed", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	if string(data) != "free" {
		http.Error(w, "busy", http.StatusConflict)
		return
	}
	jobGate.Lock()
	_ = os.WriteFile(lockPath, []byte("held"), 0o644)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
